import sys
sys.path.insert(0, '/opt/triposr')

from tsr.utils import get_spherical_cameras, get_intrinsic_from_fov, get_ray_directions, get_rays
import inspect

# Get full source of get_spherical_cameras with line numbers
print('=== get_spherical_cameras FULL source ===')
src = inspect.getsource(get_spherical_cameras)
for i, line in enumerate(src.split('\n')):
    print(f'{i:3d}: {line}')

print('\n=== get_intrinsic_from_fov FULL source ===')
src = inspect.getsource(get_intrinsic_from_fov)
for i, line in enumerate(src.split('\n')):
    print(f'{i:3d}: {line}')

print('\n=== get_ray_directions FULL source ===')
src = inspect.getsource(get_ray_directions)
for i, line in enumerate(src.split('\n')):
    print(f'{i:3d}: {line}')

# Also test: get the actual rays_o/rays_d for a known camera to understand convention
print('\n=== Testing camera convention ===')
import torch
rays_o, rays_d = get_spherical_cameras(
    n_views=4, elevation_deg=0.0, camera_distance=1.9, fovy_deg=40.0, height=256, width=256
)
print(f'rays_o shape: {rays_o.shape}')  # (n_views, H*W, 3)
print(f'rays_d shape: {rays_d.shape}')
print(f'rays_o[0] unique origins: {rays_o[0].reshape(256,256,3)[0,0]}')
print(f'rays_o[1] unique origins: {rays_o[1].reshape(256,256,3)[0,0]}')
print(f'rays_o[2] unique origins: {rays_o[2].reshape(256,256,3)[0,0]}')
print(f'rays_o[3] unique origins: {rays_o[3].reshape(256,256,3)[0,0]}')

# Check what n_views=1 gives
rays_o1, rays_d1 = get_spherical_cameras(
    n_views=1, elevation_deg=30.0, camera_distance=1.5, fovy_deg=40.0, height=256, width=256
)
print(f'\nSingle view at el=30, dist=1.5:')
print(f'rays_o shape: {rays_o1.shape}')
origin = rays_o1[0].reshape(256,256,3)[0,0]
print(f'Origin: {origin}')
